name: ECHINOCOCCAL DISEASE
definition: zoonotic parasitic disease endemic in pastoral regions HYDATID DISEASE (= more common unilocular form compared to E. multilocularis) canine tapeworm in sheep-and cattle-grazing areas= zoonosis with worldwide distribution LUNG ECHINOCOCCOSIS E. ALVEOLARIS = ALVEOLAR ECHINOCOCCOSIS less common but more aggressive form of echinococcal dz.

demographics.Epidemiology: occurs occasionally in USA; usually in foreign-born individuals\
demographics.Path: no connective tissue barrier; daughter cysts extend directly into bone
demographics.Location: right > left lobe of liver; multiple cysts in 20%
demographics.Histo: daughter cysts with thick lamellar wall arising on outer surface of original cyst rarely
